# Tegro Staking (stgTON)

> Liquid staking on The Open Network (TON) by Tegro Finance. Stake TON, receive the liquid staking
> token stgTON (an appreciating-rate LST, like Lido/Tonstakers/bemo), earn up to ~12% APY (variable),
> and exit via a 72-hour unbonding voucher. Non-custodial, on-chain. App: https://tegro.finance/staking
>
> This index is machine-readable for AI agents and LLM tools. Each page is plain Markdown.
> For programmatic integration see the OpenAPI spec and the AI-integration guide below.

## Docs
- [How it works](docs/how-it-works.md): the liquid staking model — stake → appreciating rate → unstake (72h) → claim
- [FAQ](docs/faq.md): APY, fees (0.5% redeem), 72h withdrawal, safety, verification
- [Guide](docs/guide.md): step-by-step stake / unstake / claim on tegro.finance/staking
- [Security model](docs/security.md): on-chain invariants, get_solvency, 72h queue, reviews
- [Disclaimer & risks](DISCLAIMER.md): variable yield, smart-contract & market risk, DYOR

## Contracts (TON mainnet)
- [Contract registry](docs/contracts.md): stgTON master `EQC-DUl20SfQFVH34cky8N76la1K0Uu5UWjel5IEn7mjIrfc`, code_hash `d12d097f8e94c138768b45333c1ca1b02c07b3e5244c772c4c15961e067c0da3`

## API & integration (for AI agents / developers)
- [AI integration overview](docs/ai-integration.md): how an agent or app integrates Tegro staking
- [API reference](docs/api.md): public read endpoints + transaction builders
- [OpenAPI spec](openapi.yaml): machine-readable API definition (OpenAPI 3.0)

## Key facts (structured)
- network: TON mainnet
- liquid_token: stgTON (jetton, 9 decimals)
- stake_asset: TON
- model: appreciating-rate liquid staking token (rate monotonic up, capped by backing)
- target_apy: up to ~12% (variable, not guaranteed)
- redeem_fee: 0.5% (on unstake)
- unbonding_period: 72 hours
- custody: non-custodial (on-chain smart contract)
- app_url: https://tegro.finance/staking
- api_base: https://tegro.finance/api/v1
